shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files | sed -n '1,120p' && rg -n \"supports|maxZoom|Zoom|isImage|zoom\" src test tests 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,240p'"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/components/LightboxRoot.tsx && sed -n '1,180p' src/plugins/zoom/ResponsiveImage.tsx && rg -n \"render\\.slide|slide:\" src/components src | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff -- src/plugins/zoom && npx vitest run test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' test/unit/plugins/Video.spec.ts && sed -n '1,150p' test/types/src/App.tsx && sed -n '1,100p' tsconfig.json && git diff --check"

/bin/bash -lc 'npx tsc --noEmit --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 -p tsconfig.json && npx eslint src/plugins/zoom/index.ts src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"supports\\?|maxZoom\\?: number|Slide\\)\" dist/plugins/zoom/index.d.ts dist/plugins/zoom/index.js | head -30 && git diff --stat"
